title: February 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 21''' is the 52nd day of the year. There are 313 days remaining (314 in leap years).</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Al Locatelli]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Anthony Daniels]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Larry Drake]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Christopher Yost]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Kumail Nanjiani]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Shauna Macdonald]] is born.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[The Coming Storm]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1995]] – [[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] published.
*[[1997]] – The [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] released in theaters.
*[[2001]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 2|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 2]] published.
*2001 – ''[[Star Wars: Starfighter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Sentinel]]'' released.
*2011 – ''[[Star Wars: Mysteries of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Aftermath: Empire's End]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 3]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 17|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 17]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[The Bad Batch (episode)|The Bad Batch]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – "[[Confined]]," "[[Paths Unknown]]," and "[[Shadows of Tantiss]]" aired on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Star Wars (2020) 43|''Star Wars'' (2020) 43]] published.
